items.caption: A black hoodie with a text message printed on the front. the text is a motivational statement that reads, "conversations will not be cancelled. relationships will not be cancelled. love will not be cancelled. songs will not be cancelled. reading will not be cancelled. self-care will not be cancelled. hope will not be cancelled. may we lean into the good stuff that remains." the hoodie is displayed against a backdrop that includes a brick wall with a colorful pattern and various badges and logos, including a "best seller" badge, a "100% best quality" badge, and a "made in the usa" badge. the overall style of the image suggests it is a promotional graphic for the hoodie, highlighting its design and the message it carries.
